emails.subject: Latest Variances
emails.body: Latest Variances See attached file for updates. Kate, I have not seen the corrected prices for 566424.1 and 566426.1 come through yet maybe tomorrow. Deal 573862.1 .2 $107 your sheet has $168.45 please advise which price is correct Deal 578856.1 21 @$150 your sheet has $182.92 please advise which price is correct Let me know if you need further clarification. Thanks Brooklyn 713.853.1909
